sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmaps (id UInt32, bitmap_data UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_bitmaps VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([3, 4, 5]));
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapOr(bitmap_data, bitmapBuild([6, 7]))) AS res FROM test_bitmaps;
UPDATE test_bitmaps SET bitmap_data = bitmapOr(bitmap_data, bitmapBuild([8, 9])) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapOr(bitmap_data, bitmapBuild([]))) AS res FROM test_bitmaps WHERE id = 2;
